svg.title: BM25 Retriever in LangChain
svg.desc: A flowchart showing how LangChain's BM25Retriever works: documents are tokenised and indexed offline using term-frequency and inverse document-frequency statistics. At query time the query is tokenised, each document receives a BM25 score, and the top-k highest-scoring documents are returned.
svg.text: Offline indexing phase (done once at startup)

g.text: TF · IDF · doc-length normalisation per term
Sort by score descending, return top k docs
